info.title: Scenario Studio Api
info.description: API access to Moody's Analytics Scenario Studio.

get.summary: Gets the records for a search query.
Gets the record count for a search query.
Get the list of base/moody's scenarios.
Gets base/moody's scenario detail.
Gets the full details on a base scenario.

parameters.name: scenarioId
parameters.description: The Id of the base scenario.

post.summary: Search base scenarios.
Search base scenarios.

get.summary: Gets the list of permissionable clients (in the context of the person making the request).
Gets the health of the service.
Gets the list of projects the user has access to.
Gets information about a specific project.

post.summary: Starts the build process for a project.

get.summary: Gets the list of checkpoints for a scenario.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The project Id in which the scenario belongs to.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description:
The contributor role. 
Inactive = 0,
Admin = 1,
Editor = 2,
Observer = 3

get.summary: Gets multiple series and/or expressions.

parameters.name: expressions
parameters.description:
A semicolon delimited list of series and/or expression.
Series should be formatted as [location].[scenario-alias].[variable id].
Examples:
l.bl.fet_us --> local data for the bl scenario
c.bl.fet_us --> central data for the bl scenario
bl.fet_us --> central data for the bl scenario
l.bl.fet_us;c.bl.fet_us;l.bl.fet_us-c.bl.fet_us --> local bl data, central bl data, expression containing both central and local data

parameters.name: frequency
parameters.description: The frequency of the data (defaults to quarterly).

parameters.name: transformation
parameters.description:
Optional enumeration for transforming the series data. 
0 = None,
1 = Year Over Year %
2 = Simple Difference
3 = Annualized Growth
4 = % Change
8 = Year Over Year Difference

parameters.name: conversionMethod
parameters.description: Overrides the conversion method being used during the frequency conversion.

post.summary: Gets multiple series and/or expressions.

parameters.name: expressions
parameters.description:
An array of series and/or expression.
Series should be formatted as [location].[scenario-alias].[variable id].
Examples:
l.bl.fet_us --> local data for the bl scenario
c.bl.fet_us --> central data for the bl scenario
bl.fet_us --> central data for the bl scenario
["l.bl.fet_us, "c.bl.fet_us", "l.bl.fet_us-c.bl.fet_us"] --> local bl data, central bl data, expression containing both central and local data

parameters.name: frequency
parameters.description: The frequency of the data (defaults to quarterly).

parameters.name: transformation
parameters.description:
Optional enumeration for transforming the series data. 
0 = None,
1 = Year Over Year %
2 = Simple Difference
3 = Annualized Growth
4 = % Change
8 = Year Over Year Difference

parameters.name: conversionMethod
parameters.description: Overrides the conversion method being used during the frequency conversion.

get.summary: Gets the list of geographies for a project.
Gets information on any single order.

parameters.name: parentOnly
parameters.description: when false to checks child orders; else only checks the passed in order.

get.summary: Checks the project build status.
Gets the scenarios within a project.
Gets information about a specific scenario.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The project Id of the scenario.

get.summary: Gets information about a specific series.

post.summary: Creates new checkpoint

put.summary: Restore checkpoint's series to a scenario

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: The series save payload (can be entire series, or just deltas)

put.summary: Clears add factors on series in which you have claimed.

post.summary: Runs an interpolation calculation (annual to quarterly)

put.summary: Edits the equation of a series.
Changes the last historical end point for a series.

get.summary: Gets sharedown information for a series.

post.summary: Checks out all variables within a sharedown chain, and starts the sharedown calculation.

Releases a series/unlocks a series without writing data to central.
If releasing a custom series that has never been pushed to central,
the custom series is deleted.

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: The list of variables to push.

post.summary: Claim/check out series.

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: The list of variables to claim.

parameters.name: exogenize
parameters.description: When true, sets series to be exogenous; else series default to the current central state.

post.summary: Push to central/commit a series- writes local data to central.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: The list of series to push, and a note describing the changes.

post.summary: Creates new custom series.

parameters.name: series
parameters.description: The list of series to create.

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: The list of series to delete.

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: The list of variables to set to endogenous.

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: The list of variables to set to exogenous.

put.summary: Sets series to be partially exogenized.

parameters.name: bulkRequest
parameters.description: The list of series along with the exogenize through value.

post.summary: Gets series info for a list of series/expressions.
Starts an add factor solve for one or more series.

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: The list of series to perform the add factor solve on.

post.summary: Performs a central solve on a scenario.

parameters.name: scenarioId
parameters.description: The Id of the scenario to solve.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The Id of the project which contains the scenario being solved.

post.summary: Performs a local solve on a scenario.

parameters.name: scenarioId
parameters.description: The Id of the scenario to solve.

post.summary: Imports data from another scenario.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The project Id to to be written to.

parameters.name: scenarioId
parameters.description: The scenario Id to be written to.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: The scenario Id to read from, and if the series should be claimed.

get.summary: Gets all meta information for a series.

delete.summary: Removes a scenario from a project.

Adds an existing scenario to a project

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The project Id in which the scenario will be added to.

InterpolationPayload.description: Options for creating a new interpolation.

editStart.description: Start date in which to calculate the interpolation.

data.description: The source data for the interpolation calculation.

conversionMethod.description: Conversion method used during interpolation calculation.

forcePositive.description: Force positive values within the interpolation result.

continuity.description: Preserve data continuity at the start of the interpolation range.
